meaning: n.柴迪科舞[曲](美国一种黑人舞曲)(亦作zodico,zologo)
examples: Volume V, containing entries from slab through zydeco, was published today by Harvard University Press.
But after Katrina, New Orleans jazz, blues and zydeco artists were scattered across the nation.
The clamorous faux-zydeco of "Run Chicken Run" bursts with energy.
